items.title: Source: Vet DE Campbell reuniting with Ravens
items.body_text: Veteran defensive end Calais Campbell, who played with the Ravens from 2020 to 2022, is returning to sign a one-year deal with Baltimore, a source told ESPN's Adam Schefter.
items.author: Jamison Hensley

items.title: Sources: Giants' Slayton has core-muscle surgery
items.body_text: Giants wide receiver Darius Slayton had surgery for a core-muscle injury recently and is expected to be sidelined throughout the Giants' offseason program this spring, sources told NFL Network.

items.title: Sources: Steelers not picking up option on Jones
items.body_text: Tackle Broderick Jones, who continues to recover from offseason neck surgery, won't have his fifth-year option picked up by the Steelers, sources told ESPN's Jeremy Fowler.
items.author: Brooke Pryor

items.title: Bengals decline DE Murphy's option, source says
items.body_text: The Bengals are not picking up the fifth-year option for defensive end Myles Murphy, a source told ESPN's Jeremy Fowler.
items.author: Ben Baby

items.title: Browns break ground on stadium targeted for '29
items.body_text: Browns owner Jimmy Haslam and NFL commissioner Roger Goodell were on hand for the groundbreaking ceremony for the team's new domed stadium scheduled to open for the 2029 season.

items.title: Source: Pack pick up Van Ness' fifth-year option
items.body_text: Despite recording only 8.5 sacks over his first three NFL seasons, Packers defensive end Lukas Van Ness had the fifth-year option picked up on his rookie deal, a source confirmed to ESPN on Thursday.
items.author: Rob Demovsky

items.title: Simmons retires as Bronco: 'My heart, my home'
items.body_text: Two-time Pro Bowl safety Justin Simmons announced Wednesday that he is retiring from the NFL as a member of the Broncos.
items.author: Jeff Legwold

items.title: Texans, LB Al-Shaair agree to 3-year extension
items.body_text: The Texans and linebacker Azeez Al-Shaair have reached agreement on a three-year, $54 million extension, according to NFL Network.
items.author: DJ Bien-Aime
